column2:
книги
Grammar Point: Genitive singular feminine (а → и)
Notes: "нет + genitive" = don't have

моего брата
Grammar Point: Genitive singular masculine (possession)
Notes: "чей? чья? чьё?" = whose? Use genitive to show possession

воды
Grammar Point: Genitive singular feminine (quantity)
Notes: After words indicating quantity/measurement

нового стола
Grammar Point: Genitive singular masculine noun + adjective
Notes: Adjective ending: -ого/-его for masculine/neuter genitive

центра города
Grammar Point: Genitive after preposition "от"
Notes: Many prepositions require genitive: от; до; из; без; для; у; около

чёрного кофе
Grammar Point: Genitive masculine adjective + noun (quantity)
Notes: кофе is masculine; adjective ending -ого

красной ручки
Grammar Point: Genitive singular feminine adjective + noun
Notes: Feminine adjective ending: -ой/-ей in genitive

студентов
Grammar Point: Genitive plural masculine
Notes: After "сколько" (how many); use genitive plural

моих друзей
Grammar Point: Genitive plural (друг → друзей)
Notes: Plural adjective genitive ending: -ых/-их

Москвы
Grammar Point: Genitive after "из" (from)
Notes: из + genitive for origin/source

большой собаки
Grammar Point: Genitive after "бояться" (to fear)
Notes: Some verbs require genitive: бояться; хотеть (with negation); избегать

моей сестры
Grammar Point: Genitive with "у" (to have construction)
Notes: "у + genitive + есть" = someone has something

нашего учителя
Grammar Point: Genitive after "ждать" (to wait for)
Notes: ждать requires genitive case for the object

старых родителей
Grammar Point: Genitive plural adjective + noun (possession)
Notes: родители is plural only; genitive plural: родителей

column1: Без _____ (хороший словарь) я не могу учиться
column2:
хорошего словаря
Grammar Point: Genitive after "без" (without)
Notes: без + genitive = without

свежего хлеба
Grammar Point: Genitive for absence/negation
Notes: нет + genitive = there is no/there are no

конца недели
Grammar Point: Genitive after "до" (before/until)
Notes: до + genitive indicates time limit or spatial limit

новых книг
Grammar Point: Genitive plural feminine adjective + noun
Notes: книга → книг (genitive plural drops final vowel)

моего младшего брата
Grammar Point: Genitive after "для" (for)
Notes: для + genitive = for the benefit/purpose of

нашего дома
Grammar Point: Genitive after "около" (near)
Notes: около + genitive = near/approximately
